history.1.0.0: Initial release. Loads all platforms, registers async_reload_entry listener.
history.1.0.1: Added _slugify() helper. Stores remote_entity and media_player_entity in hass.data derived from tv_name so all platforms use correct entity IDs regardless of the name chosen during setup.
history.1.0.2: Attempted to guard async_reload_entry against non-custom_inputs writes. Did not work reliably due to race conditions.
history.1.0.3: Removed update listener entirely. Listener fired on every async_update_entry call including Include switch toggles, causing a full reload that wiped homekit_inputs immediately after it was written. Reloads are now triggered explicitly by button.py after saving or deleting inputs only.

history.1.0.0: Initial release. ReloadHomeKitButton, TestCommandButton, AddCustomInputButton, DeleteCustomInputButton.
history.1.1.0: AddCustomInputButton reads AppleTVAppSwitch state. When ON, saves command_type=media_player_source so media_player.py uses select_source instead of play_media.
history.1.2.0: AddCustomInputButton reads AppleTVInputSwitch state. When ON, embeds HAP identifier as |input_N third segment in command string. Graceful degradation if HAP Identifier field is empty.
history.1.3.0: Added NextSavedInputButton (Next Saved Input, CONFIG category). Calls _cycle_custom_inputs() directly — same logic and shared index as the iOS remote Info button.
history.1.4.0: DeleteCustomInputButton now also removes deleted input from homekit_inputs. NextSavedInputButton updated to warn when no Include switches are ON.
history.1.5.0: TestCommandButton completely rewritten — now CONFIG, reads same fields as Save Input and executes without saving. Supports all command types. Save Input renumbered to 1g, Delete to 1h.
history.1.5.1: AddCustomInputButton and DeleteCustomInputButton now call async_reload explicitly after writing options. Required because the update listener in __init__.py was removed in 1.0.3.

history.1.0.0: Initial release. Scans entity registry for homekit_controller media_player entities, presents dropdown and tv_name field, creates config entry.
Initial release. Bridges iOS HomeKit remote key events to HAP commands. Reads entity IDs from hass.data instead of hardcoding.
history.1.1.0: Added media_player_source command_type. Uses select_source instead of play_media — required for Apple TV app launching.
history.1.2.0: _execute_input_command for media_player_source supports optional third |input_N segment for automatic HDMI input switching before app launch.
history.1.3.0: Stores self in hass.data[media_player_entity_ref] so NextSavedInputButton can call _cycle_custom_inputs() directly.
history.1.4.0: Added _included_inputs() helper filtering custom_inputs to those in options[homekit_inputs]. source_list and _cycle_custom_inputs() now respect Include switches.
history.1.4.1: Restored _included_inputs() filter, media_player_entity_ref store, filtered source_list and _cycle_custom_inputs — all accidentally dropped in a regression. Clean comment pass.

history.1.0.0: Initial release. Core HAP communication layer. Connects to TV via homekit_controller pairing, scans for RemoteKey/Active/VolumeSelector/ActiveIdentifier/Mute characteristics, polls and subscribes to ActiveIdentifier, dispatches all HAP commands.

Initial release. InputTypeSelectEntity dropdown populated from all remote.* and media_player.* entities in HA. Selected value stored in-memory only, resets to hap on reload. Also excludes own entities more robustly using hass.data slug lookup.
Initial release. Creates one SavedInputSensor per entry in custom_inputs. Orphan cleanup on every reload removes sensor entities whose unique_id no longer matches a saved input.
Initial release. DebugListenSwitch and DebugSendSwitch toggle log tags live. AppleTVSwitch selects select_source vs play_media for media_player inputs (in-memory only).
history.1.1.0: Renamed AppleTVSwitch to AppleTVAppSwitch. Added AppleTVInputSwitch: embeds HAP identifier as |input_N for automatic HDMI switching before Apple TV app launch.
history.1.2.0: Version alignment only — no logic changes from 1.1.0.
history.1.3.0: Added HomeKitInputSwitch: one persistent switch per saved input. Controls HomeKit/HA source list visibility and input cycle inclusion. Persists to options[homekit_inputs]. Default OFF. Orphan cleanup on reload.
history.1.3.1: Fixed _update_options stale config entry bug. Now fetches live entry via async_get_entry() so homekit_inputs accumulates correctly across multiple switch toggles.

history.1.0.0: Initial release. ConfigTextEntity fields for input configuration. CurrentIdentifierTextEntity displays active TV input.
history.1.0.1: CurrentIdentifierTextEntity reads remote entity ID from hass.data instead of hardcoding remote.homekit_tv.
history.1.1.0: Removed separate test_command ConfigTextEntity. Testing now uses existing config fields + Test Command button. CurrentIdentifierTextEntity moved to CONFIG category and renamed to 1i. Current Identifier.
